parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
participant "client application" as client
participant "kong" as kong
participant "resource service" as resource

== get token ==
client -> kong : Post (provision_key etc.)
kong -> client : return redirect url and token

== get resource ==
client -> kong : Post (sending Host and Token)
kong -> kong : verify token
kong -> resource : Proxy, load balance...
resource -> kong
kong -> client

== refresh token ==
client -> kong : send refresh token and other info
kong -> client : return token and refresh token
@enduml
```
